table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 事故/情况

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 结果

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:1px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 在未关闭机床电源的条件下执行检查或维护操作

para.text: （请参阅

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 触电，机床故障，异常操作，火灾

para.text: 触摸具有残余电压的装置（请参阅

para.text: 接线端子或其他位置螺丝松脱

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 机床故障，异常操作，火灾

para.text: 机床控制器门或接线盒盖板未关闭

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 漏电，机床故障，异常操作，火灾

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 用湿手触摸开关

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 触电

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 机床周围裸露地面的电缆受损

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 漏电，机床故障，异常操作，火灾

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 非合格人员进行操作或维护

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 机床故障

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:1px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:11px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:21px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:1px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:11px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:21px left ;
li.text: 在执行伺服放大器，主轴放大器和变频器的维护之前，请关闭主电源开关，并确定每个装置的LED充电指示器（红色）已熄灭。

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:11px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:21px left ;
li.text: 高压电流通过接线盒内部组件。

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:11px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:21px left ;
li.text: 即使在关闭电源的主开关后，高压电流仍会持续流入主电源开关主动侧。

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:11px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:21px left ;
li.text: 即使在关闭主电源开关后，电流仍会持续流入机床控制器的指示灯和输出侧。
